note: Added transparent forum avatars: sost-avatar-transparent-100.png (AltcoinsTalk standard) and sost-avatar-transparent-150.png (BitcoinTalk Hero/Legendary). Alpha extracted from sost-logo.png with max(R,G,B) so the red SOST mark stays opaque, the black background becomes fully transparent and the anti-aliased edges are preserved. Square, 6% inner padding, ~3-5 KB. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
